title: gdm, gnome-shell, and gsettings-desktop-schemas bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
gdm
[40.1-38.0.1]
- Disable Wayland on Matrox [Orabug: 34816116]

[40.1-38]
- Fix issue on conflicting sessions when they are remote
  Resolves: RHEL-123357

gnome-shell
[40.10-31]
- Don't fail if disable-show-password doesn't exist
  Related: RHEL-109190

[40.10-30]
- Fix regression on multiple remote sessions and same user
  Also, add missing fix to keep API/ABI compatibility on GDM greeter proxy.
  Resolves: RHEL-109190

gsettings-desktop-schemas
[40.0-8]
- Add an option to disable showing password entry at login/lockscreen
  Resolves: RHEL-123140
full_text:
gdm
[40.1-38.0.1]
- Disable Wayland on Matrox [Orabug: 34816116]

[40.1-38]
- Fix issue on conflicting sessions when they are remote
  Resolves: RHEL-123357

gnome-shell
[40.10-31]
- Don't fail if disable-show-password doesn't exist
  Related: RHEL-109190

[40.10-30]
- Fix regression on multiple remote sessions and same user
  Also, add missing fix to keep API/ABI compatibility on GDM greeter proxy.
  Resolves: RHEL-109190

gsettings-desktop-schemas
[40.0-8]
- Add an option to disable showing password entry at login/lockscreen
  Resolves: RHEL-123140

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20951.html
